workflow_rationale: This is a multi-component feature requiring data models, permissions, workspaces, activity tracking, and notifications. Following service dependency order, we build core models first, then add functionality layers, and integrate at the end.

phases.name: Data Models
phases.description: Create Pydantic data models for users, teams, workspaces, roles, and permissions. These foundational models will be used by all other collaboration features.

subtasks.description: Create User and Team models with basic fields and validation

verification.command: python -c "from autoflow.collaboration.models import User, Team; print('Models imported successfully')"

subtasks.notes: Successfully created User and Team models with all required fields and validation. Also created supporting models (Workspace, Role, Permission, ActivityEvent, Notification) for future phases. All models follow patterns from autoflow/core/state.py with Pydantic BaseModel, proper type hints, and datetime timestamps. Verification passed: models import successfully and all methods work correctly.

subtasks.description: Create Workspace model with team association and metadata

verification.command: python -c "from autoflow.collaboration.models import Workspace; w = Workspace(id='test', name='Test'); print(f'Workspace: {w.name}')"

subtasks.notes: Workspace model was already implemented as part of subtask-1-1. The model includes team association (team_id field), metadata field, settings dict, and follows all patterns from state.py (Pydantic BaseModel, Field with default_factory, datetime timestamps, touch() method). Verification passed: Workspace model imports successfully and all fields are properly defined.

subtasks.description: Create Role and Permission models with enum-based definitions

verification.command: python -c "from autoflow.collaboration.models import Role, Permission, RoleType; print(f'Roles: {[r.value for r in RoleType]}')"

subtasks.notes: Role and Permission models were already implemented as part of subtask-1-1. RoleType enum defines OWNER, ADMIN, MEMBER, REVIEWER, VIEWER. Permission enum defines comprehensive permissions for tasks, specs, reviews, team/workspace management, and general actions. Role model includes user_id, role_type, team_id, workspace_id, granted_by, granted_at, expires_at, metadata, and is_expired() method. All models follow patterns from state.py (str, Enum inheritance, Pydantic BaseModel, Field with default_factory, proper docstrings). Verification passed: RoleType enum values are accessible.

subtasks.description: Create ActivityEvent and Notification models for tracking actions

verification.command: python -c "from autoflow.collaboration.models import ActivityEvent, Notification; print('Event models imported')"

subtasks.description: Add unit tests for all collaboration data models

verification.command: pytest tests/test_collaboration_models.py -v

phases.name: Permissions System
phases.description: Implement role-based permission checking system that controls who can perform actions (dispatch, review, modify specs, etc.)

subtasks.description: Create PermissionManager class with role checking methods

verification.command: python -c "from autoflow.collaboration.permissions import PermissionManager; print('PermissionManager imported')"

subtasks.description: Implement can_dispatch, can_review, can_modify_spec permission checks

verification.command: python -c "from autoflow.collaboration.permissions import PermissionManager; pm = PermissionManager(); print('Methods:', [m for m in dir(pm) if 'can_' in m])"

subtasks.description: Add unit tests for permission checking logic

verification.command: pytest tests/test_collaboration_permissions.py -v

phases.name: Workspace Management
phases.description: Implement shared workspace functionality where teams can collaborate on specs with shared state and access control

subtasks.description: Create WorkspaceManager class with CRUD operations for workspaces

verification.command: python -c "from autoflow.collaboration.workspace import WorkspaceManager; print('WorkspaceManager imported')"

subtasks.description: Implement workspace member management (add/remove members, assign roles)

verification.command: python -c "from autoflow.collaboration.workspace import WorkspaceManager; wm = WorkspaceManager(); print('Member methods:', [m for m in dir(wm) if 'member' in m])"

subtasks.description: Integrate workspace state with StateManager for persistent storage

verification.command: python -c "from autoflow.core.state import StateManager; sm = StateManager('.autoflow'); print(hasattr(sm, 'workspaces_dir'))"

subtasks.description: Add unit tests for workspace management

verification.command: pytest tests/test_collaboration_workspace.py -v

phases.name: Activity Feed
phases.description: Implement activity tracking system that logs all team member actions (dispatches, reviews, spec changes) for audit trail and visibility

subtasks.description: Create ActivityTracker class with event logging methods

verification.command: python -c "from autoflow.collaboration.activity import ActivityTracker; print('ActivityTracker imported')"

subtasks.description: Implement activity feed querying with filters (user, workspace, event type, date range)

verification.command: python -c "from autoflow.collaboration.activity import ActivityTracker; at = ActivityTracker(); print('Query methods:', [m for m in dir(at) if 'query' in m or 'get' in m])"

subtasks.description: Integrate activity tracking into StateManager for persistent storage

verification.command: python -c "from autoflow.core.state import StateManager; sm = StateManager('.autoflow'); print(hasattr(sm, 'activities_dir'))"

subtasks.description: Add unit tests for activity tracking

verification.command: pytest tests/test_collaboration_activity.py -v

phases.name: Notifications
phases.description: Implement notification system that alerts team members about relevant events (review requests, mentions, spec updates)

subtasks.description: Create NotificationManager class with notification creation and delivery methods

verification.command: python -c "from autoflow.collaboration.notifications import NotificationManager; print('NotificationManager imported')"

subtasks.description: Implement notification methods for review requests, mentions, and workspace updates

verification.command: python -c "from autoflow.collaboration.notifications import NotificationManager; nm = NotificationManager(); print('Notify methods:', [m for m in dir(nm) if 'notify' in m])"

subtasks.description: Integrate notification storage with StateManager

verification.command: python -c "from autoflow.core.state import StateManager; sm = StateManager('.autoflow'); print(hasattr(sm, 'notifications_dir'))"

subtasks.description: Add unit tests for notification system

verification.command: pytest tests/test_collaboration_notifications.py -v

phases.name: Collaborative Review Workflow
phases.description: Extend existing review system to support multiple reviewers with role-based approval requirements and discussion threads

subtasks.description: Create CollaborativeReview class extending cross-review with multiple reviewers

verification.command: python -c "from autoflow.collaboration.review import CollaborativeReview; print('CollaborativeReview imported')"

subtasks.description: Implement multi-reviewer approval workflow with role-based voting

verification.command: python -c "from autoflow.collaboration.review import CollaborativeReview; cr = CollaborativeReview(); print('Review methods:', [m for m in dir(cr) if not m.startswith('_')])"

subtasks.description: Integrate notifications with review requests and approvals

verification.instructions: Review code to verify notification integration in review workflow

phases.name: Integration
phases.description: Integrate all collaboration features into CLI commands and verify end-to-end functionality

subtasks.description: Add CLI commands for workspace management (workspace create, list, members)

verification.command: autoflow workspace --help

subtasks.description: Add CLI commands for activity feed and notifications (activity list, notifications list)

verification.command: autoflow activity --help

subtasks.description: Add CLI commands for team management (team create, add-member, set-role)

verification.command: autoflow team --help

subtasks.description: Update configuration system to support collaboration settings

verification.command: python -c "from autoflow.core.config import Config; c = Config(); print(hasattr(c, 'collaboration'))"

subtasks.description: End-to-end verification: create workspace, add members, dispatch task, review, verify activity feed

steps: Add team members with different roles
Check activity feed shows all actions

subtasks.description: Run all tests to verify integration

verification.command: pytest tests/test_collaboration*.py -v

parallel_groups.reason: Both depend only on phase-1 (data models) and operate on different subsystems
Phase-4 depends on phase-3, phase-5 depends on phase-4, so these are sequential

acceptance_criteria: New collaboration features have unit test coverage
Activity feed tracks all team actions
Notifications are created for relevant events

verification_steps.name: CLI Commands Verification
verification_steps.expected_outcome: All new CLI commands are available

verification_strategy.reasoning: High risk change adding new multi-user features with permissions and access control. Requires comprehensive unit and integration tests plus security scanning to ensure permission system works correctly and doesn't introduce vulnerabilities.
